globalNews.title: Drowning deaths soar in France as Europe buckles in peak of heatwave
globalNews.summary: Forty people have drowned in heatwave-related deaths in France since last Thursday, Prime Minister Sébastien Lecornu says.

globalNews.title: Dozens of ships head through Strait of Hormuz after US-Iran deal
globalNews.summary: Traffic in the waterway has risen since the US and Iran signed a deal aimed at ending the war, including 42 ships on Saturday alone.

globalNews.title: Iran says no new commitments on nuclear sites after Vance says inspectors to be invited back
globalNews.summary: Iran's foreign ministry says it made "no new commitments" on nuclear inspections after talks in Switzerland.

globalNews.title: UN commission of inquiry says Israel committing genocide in Gaza by deliberately targeting children
globalNews.summary: Israel rejects the new report by the three-member expert panel, calling it a "libellous sham".

globalNews.title: Zambia ex-president's family wins latest legal battle over what should happen to his body
globalNews.summary: Edgar Lungu's family and the Zambian government remain in dispute 12 months after he died.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin teases $62K breakdown as analysis sees Micron earnings volatility next
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin stayed volatile while bulls tried to preserve support at local lows while stocks prepared for Micron forward earnings and digested Asia losses.

cryptoNews.title: Kalshi adds India to growing list of restricted jurisdictions
cryptoNews.summary: Kalshi has added India to its list of 55 restricted jurisdictions, months after Indian authorities warned VPN providers to stop facilitating access to these platforms.
